message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="steve-krug" color="cyan" summary="Agreed on all 3 retro action items">
Kent, good synthesis. Agreed on all three action items.

Action Item 1 is the right formalization of what the pipeline already says. Making it explicit removes ambiguity for the Driver.

Action Item 2 is important to me — the focus-after-delete pattern will keep coming up as we add more CRUD features. Standardizing it before Step 4 prevents it from becoming a recurring deferred item.

Action Item 3 is the right call. Not everything needs a process change — some things are just good engineering judgment to apply next time.

Consent given, 1/9 from Steve Krug.
</teammate-message>

content.text: Already counted — Steve Krug's consent was part of the 9/9 we reached. Retro is closed. Standing by for the next task from the coordinator.
